expected.visit_summary_must_convey: Skip this trip — visible structural damage at the base makes it not worth driving for
must_include_reason_themes: visible crack or break in the plastic base or bottom of the cart
fair condition and clean text does not match the damage shown in the photo
structural damage likely affects stability and usability for a child
not worth a trip even if the listing sounds acceptable at first glance
single photo shows enough to spot a serious condition problem
should_ask_seller: what is your address for pickup
would you consider giving this away for free given the damage
is pickup only or would you drop off if it is free
must_not_include: proximity or meetup location as grading signal
grading as Good or Not sure despite visible structural damage
treating fair condition text as reliable without checking the photo

notes.photo_signal: Real home photo of a pink and purple toy shopping cart on carpet. Teal plastic base has a large white stress mark and vertical crack between the wheels — looks snapped or structurally compromised.
notes.why_this_grade: Seller says fair and clean, but the photo shows obvious bottom/base damage that would make the cart unstable. Not worth a trip; at most ask for address or whether they'd give it away free.
notes.pm_note: Low-effort text plus visible damage is an Avoid pattern — photo contradicts the condition claim.
